parameters.content:
## Workflow 1 — WhatsApp Incoming
Webhook → Normalize → Engine (/api/engine/process) → ACK.

The engine performs: identify business by phone_number_id → resolve customer → save inbound → memory → RAG → classify → reply → ticket → send WhatsApp → save outbound → update memory → notify support.

Point Meta's webhook at the DASHBOARD (/api/whatsapp) for GET verification (hub.challenge); use this workflow as an internal/alternative trigger.
